text: OMG my tongue just started swelling up like crazy! And my eyes are watering so much, I can't even see straight! Can someone call me? I feel like I'm going to pass out from this allergy attack!
I'm super worried about this rash on my arm. It's been really itchy and it keeps getting bigger. I feel like something bad might be happening. Should I just ignore it or should I go see a doctor?

I'm feeling a bit worried. My chest feels tight and heavy. It's been going on for about 3 hours now. I'm 65 years old, and this is my first time experiencing this. Could you please help me understand what this might mean?

I've got this awful headache that just won't go away. It's been going on for days now, and I can't seem to shake it. My head feels like it's about to explode! I'm so worried because I don't know what else to do. Can you help me?

My child just had a big headache this morning, and they've been feeling really dizzy. They're acting very confused, and they can't seem to focus. I'm worried something might be wrong with their brain. Can someone call me? Please!
Hello, I'm calling about my blood pressure medication. I haven't taken it in a few days and I'm feeling a bit worried. Should I take it right away?
I've been feeling really dizzy lately. It's starting to make my head spin. I took some sugar last night, but it didn't help much. I'm worried something might be wrong with my blood sugar.
My child has been acting weird today. He's been running around all day, but he's also really tired. He doesn't want to eat his dinner, and he keeps yawning. Should I worry?
I'm so stressed! My arm keeps tingling, and it's been happening for a few days now. Should I just ignore it? Or should I call the nurse?
My child keeps having a weird feeling in their stomach. It's been going on for a few weeks now, and they don't seem to be eating much. Should we worry?
I'm feeling really dizzy and my head hurts. I've been having this since yesterday morning. It's making it hard for me to think clearly. Should I worry?
I'm feeling a bit under the weather today. My head hurts and my throat feels a bit scratchy. It's been going on for about an hour now. Should I worry?
I've got this really bad headache that feels like my head's going to explode. It started yesterday and it's getting worse. I'm so worried about it. Can you help me figure out what might be wrong?

My child woke up this morning feeling really yucky. His tummy hurts, and he keeps throwing up. He's been like this for about 2 days now. Should we take him to the doctor? Can you help us figure this out?
I'm feeling really anxious because my throat feels tight and sore. It's been going on for about an hour now. I'm not sure if I should just wait it out or if I need to see a doctor. Should I worry?

I'm so worried about my dad. He just had a really bad headache that feels like it's going to split open. It started yesterday morning and it's been getting worse all day. He's been acting confused and he keeps saying he needs to go to the bathroom, but he can't seem to get there. I think something might be really wrong. Should I worry? Can someone call me?

I'm feeling a bit unsteady today, like my legs are wobbly. It started earlier this morning when I woke up and noticed my vision getting blurry. I've been taking my blood pressure medication every day, and everything seems fine, so I'm just wondering if this is something serious or if I should be concerned.
I'm feeling really dizzy and my vision is blurry. I've been noticing this for a few days now. Should I be worried?

Hey there, Mom! My kid got a little sick today and he has a tummy ache. He's been having it for a couple of days now, and it doesn't seem to be getting better. He's still eating and drinking normally, but he's been a bit cranky too. Should I worry? Can you call me if anything changes?
My child is super tired today and they keep yawning and drooling. They also have a runny nose and a slight cough. Should I be worried? Can someone call me if it gets worse?
I just started taking this new medicine, and now I feel really weird all over. Should I be worried?
My kid just had a big fight with their friend at school today. He's been acting weird all day and won't eat his dinner. Should we worry?

I've been feeling quite intense pain in my lower right abdomen for about two days now. It started as just a mild ache but has gotten worse over time. I'm worried something might be wrong, especially since it's not getting better. I don't think it's the kind of pain that goes away on its own. Should I try some home remedies first or should I go see a doctor?

I'm feeling a bit dizzy lately, especially when I stand up from sitting down. My doctor told me to take this new blood pressure medicine, but I'm worried it might be causing this side effect. Should I call my doctor right away?

Hello there! I'm feeling really bad today. My chest feels tight and hurts, and I can't catch my breath at all. It's been happening for a few hours now. Should I just take some medicine and wait it out? Or should I call the doctor right away? I don't want to make a big deal out of it, but something doesn't feel right.
My child has a runny nose and a cough that started yesterday. It's not super bad, just annoying. Should we take them to the doctor?

Hey, I've been having this really intense back pain that's been going on for a while now. It feels like my whole back is on fire! I'm not sure what's causing it, but it's super painful and keeps me up at night. I was hoping I could get a refill on my medication so I don't have to stop taking it. Can you help?
I'm feeling really out of breath and my chest feels tight. My doctor said it's just anxiety, but it's making me so worried! I don't want to get worse. Can you help me?
My child has been feeling a bit off lately. He's just been more tired than usual and has had a little tummy ache. Should we worry about anything?
My child has a sore throat that has been going on for a few days now. It's not super bad, just kind of uncomfortable. Should I worry?

Hi there, I'm feeling really worried about my dad. He's been complaining about his head hurting a lot lately, especially after he drinks coffee. It's so bad that he's having trouble focusing on what we're saying. I don't know if this is normal or if something might be wrong. Can you help?
Hello, I'm having some issues with my vision lately. It's blurry and gets worse when I sit still for a long time. Should I be worried?
My child has been feeling dizzy lately, and they've had a hard time focusing on their homework. They also have a headache that feels like it's behind their eyes. Should we worry?
My kid has been having this really bad pain in her tummy all day. It hurts so much she can't even eat or sleep. Should we take her to the doctor right away?
I just fell down the stairs and my knee is really hurting. It's swollen and I can't put much weight on it. Should I worry?

I just had this really weird feeling in my chest. It's been happening for like, a week now. I'm so nervous about it because I think it might be something bad, like an allergy or something. My mom keeps telling me to go see a doctor, but I feel like I don't have time for that right now. Should I worry? Can someone call me?
Hello, I'm really worried about my medication. My doc just changed my dose, and now I keep feeling dizzy and sleepy. Should I worry?
My child has a runny nose and cough, but he's been fine otherwise. He's been sick since yesterday, and he still has the same symptoms today. Should I take him to the doctor?
I'm feeling really dizzy and shaky all over. It's like my head is spinning, and I can't focus. I took some new sleeping pills last night, and I usually take them every night. Should I be worried?

I'm feeling really dizzy and my head feels like it's spinning. It's been happening for about an hour now. My eyes are blurry, and I can't seem to focus. I also have a tingling sensation in my left arm. I feel like I might pass out soon. Should I worry?
I'm feeling really tired all the time and my joints are hurting everywhere. I've been noticing it for about a week now. Is this normal? Should I just rest more?
My child has been feeling really yucky today. They've had a tummy ache since taking a new medicine they got at the pharmacy. It's not getting better, and they're super sleepy. Can you help us out?
Ugh, my stomach feels weird. I mean, it's been acting up lately, but today it's super gassy and burping. Should I just ignore it or does this sound serious?
I just fell down the stairs and my knee hurts really bad. I can't walk on it and it's swollen. I'm worried it might be broken. Can you help me figure out what to do?
I'm feeling really short of breath right now. It's kind of scary because I haven't had this before.

I'm really worried about my dad. He's been feeling really hot and achy all day long. His fever's been climbing up to 101 degrees, and he keeps sweating buckets. He said his chest feels tight too. Should we take him to the doctor?

My child has been feeling really sick lately. They've had a fever for a few days now, and their tummy hurts a lot. I'm worried because they're acting kind of tired all the time and don't want to play. What should I do?
I've been in so much pain lately. It's just... unbearable. I don't know what's wrong, but it's definitely something serious. I'm so worried, and my head is pounding. Can someone please help me?

My child is having trouble sleeping at night and wakes up more than usual. It's been going on for about a week now. I'm worried because he used to sleep really well and this has changed drastically. He also feels tired during the day and doesn't have much energy. What should I do?
I'm feeling really short of breath right now. It's making it hard to breathe normally. I've been running around all day and haven't eaten much. Should I be worried?
